title: 'They use religion to defame me': Punjab CM Bhagwant Mann rejects 'sacrilege' allegations

He stated that a viral video controversy, linked to an alleged Rs 10 lakh deal for a forensic report, is being exploited to tarnish his image. Mann insists the person in the video is an actor, not him, and accuses opposition parties of using religion for political gain.

As it enters into Day 6 of its theatrical run, the domestic net now stands at Rs 61.50 crore, with the worldwide gross crossing Rs 95.11 crore. With a reported production budget of Rs 150 crore, the film is racing to cross the Rs 60 crore domestic net mark before Akshay Kumar's 'Welcome to the Jungle', whose advance bookings have just opened ahead of its June 26 release, arrives to claim a significant share of screens.

He dedicated the award to cinema, his colleagues, and his family, acknowledging the unwavering support he has received throughout his journey. Patel emphasized Pant will have complete freedom, stressing their long-standing mutual understanding.  He assured Pant there's no extra pressure, calling Delhi his home. Patel believes Pant's inherent class will shine through, encouraging him to enjoy his natural game.

title: China’s new 'eyes in sky': How KJ-3000 is building Beijing’s airborne surveillance edge
description: China's innovative KJ-3000 airborne early warning aircraft, derived from the Y-20B transport, represents a pivotal enhancement in aerial defense with its state-of-the-art digital radar and powerful capabilities. This strategic advancement strengthens China's already formidable surveillance ecosystem, which boasts over 60 KJ-500 aircraft. As the US military grapples with modernization issues, China's rapid advancements in airborne battle management are poised to shift the airpower landscape significantly.

title: Olivia Jean files divorce complaint against Jack White after four years of marriage
description: Rockstar Jack White is facing his third divorce, with wife Olivia Jean filing for separation after four years of marriage. Citing "inappropriate marital conduct" as grounds, Jean is seeking alimony, life insurance benefits, and health insurance payments from the musician. The couple's surprise wedding in 2022, which took place on stage during a Detroit concert, has now culminated in this legal proceeding.

title: DDA flats on offer again: Who should apply, what to check before booking
description: Delhi's aspiring homeowners can take advantage of two schemes introduced by the DDA, aimed at making housing accessible to different income levels. The DDA Nagrik Awaas Yojana and Towering Heights Karkardooma Housing Scheme offer flats in desirable locations such as Narela and Siraspur. With registrations open until June 30, these programs promise a fair, first-come, first-served allocation process to help individuals fulfill their housing dreams.

If implemented, the proposal would also remove fee waivers and discounts for low-income applicants, likely affecting a significant number of Indian citizens among new Americans, whose growth has recently slowed. The public is invited to comment on these proposals within 60 days.

description: Securing a home loan involves a structured process, beginning with an eligibility assessment based on your financial standing, credit score, and income stability. Following application and fee payment, lenders meticulously verify your details and the property's legal and technical aspects. Once sanctioned, a loan agreement is signed, leading to disbursal, either in full for ready properties or in stages for under-construction ones.

title: UPSC Weekly Concepts Snapshot | From solar-powered highways to coral reefs: What’s behind this week’s headlines?

Insurance firm sat on accident claim for 9 years, told to pay full vehicle value
description: A car owner has won over Rs 4 lakh after an insurance company delayed settling his accident claim for nearly a decade. The West Bengal state consumer commission held ICICI Lombard liable for deficiency in service, ordering them to pay the full insured value plus Rs 1 lakh compensation.

title: Qatar eyes LNG output recovery within weeks, easing fears of wider Iran war energy shock
description: Qatar anticipates resuming full liquefied natural gas production within weeks, signaling progress in US-Iran peace talks crucial for reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Attacks in early March had disrupted a fifth of Qatar's LNG capacity. Prime Minister Al-Thani emphasized a direct US-Iran hotline as vital for maritime stability and preventing future shipping threats, with global gas markets eagerly awaiting Qatar's restored exports.

description: India has firmly rejected Pakistan's attempt to politicize a UN forum by raising the Kashmir issue. Ambassador Parvathaneni Harish stated that Jammu and Kashmir is an internal matter for India, emphasizing that such discussions are inappropriate. He also highlighted India's push for reviewing UN Security Council mandates for greater efficiency, aligning with the UN-80 framework.

Crisil sees office REIT portfolio growing to 190-195 MSF by FY27
description: Indian office REITs are poised for significant expansion, projecting a 25-30% increase in leasable space by next fiscal year, largely through acquisitions. Strong demand from flexible workspace operators and financial institutions is expected to maintain high occupancy rates of 92-93%. This robust demand, coupled with increasing rents, will likely keep profit margins healthy at around 70%, even as debt is used to fund growth.

title: Ronaldo vs Messi at FIFA World Cup 2026: CR7 says Portugal vs Argentina clash would be 'top''
description: Cristiano Ronaldo ended a difficult week with two goals as Portugal beat Uzbekistan 5-0, topping Group K at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The 41-year-old became the first player to score in six men's World Cups. After the match, Ronaldo called a potential showdown with Lionel Messi "awesome," a clash that could materialise in the quarterfinals if Portugal secure top spot in their group against Colombia on Saturday.

title: Claude Code creator Boris Cherny says 100% AI coding is becoming ‘problematic’
description: AI's role in coding is evolving, with Anthropic's Boris Cherny admitting that 100% AI-generated code presents challenges for companies focused on ROI.  He highlighted that the true bottleneck is now 'good ideas,' not just code output.  Cherny also foresees a shift from manual prompting to 'loop engineering,' where AI agents self-refine tasks, though this raises cost concerns. Anthropic offers tools to manage these expenses for enterprise clients.

description: Sanjiv Goenka's bold 2025 prediction about Rishabh Pant's future with Lucknow Super Giants has resurfaced after the star wicketkeeper-batter's ₹15 crore trade back to Delhi Capitals. Goenka had envisioned Pant leading LSG to multiple IPL titles over 12-15 years, placing him alongside legends Dhoni and Rohit. However, Pant's two-season stint saw mixed results, culminating in this surprising player swap ahead of IPL 2027.

description: A real estate businessman's death at Lohagad Fort, initially deemed an accident, was unraveled by CCTV footage showing a suspicious man in a hoodie. Police discovered the victim's fiancée and the hooded man, her alleged lover, conspired to push him to his death. The plot involved multiple attempts, a missing passport, and a motive rooted in a secret relationship and reluctance to elope.

'Subah ka bhula ... ': Axar Patel's hilarious welcome for Rishabh Pant
description: Rishabh Pant has sensationally returned to his original IPL home, Delhi Capitals, in a blockbuster trade deal.  Captain Axar Patel humorously welcomed him back with a classic Hindi proverb, "If someone who loses his way in the morning returns home by evening, he is not considered lost." Pant's move back to DC, where he is the all-time leading run-scorer, marks a significant shift after his stint with Lucknow Super Giants.

50 stab wounds, 3 deaths, bloodied staircase: How Bengaluru techie butchered her own family
description: A shocking triple murder unfolded in Bengaluru when a techie and her live-in partner allegedly killed her parents and sister over a Rs 30 lakh loan dispute. The couple, who had kept their relationship secret, reportedly stabbed the victims multiple times before escaping from their apartment. The father, in his dying declaration, revealed the loan issue and his desire for his daughter to return home.

The family, migrants seeking a better life, had been forced onto the streets due to financial hardship.

Oracle layoffs: Company confirms how many employees got 6am email from leadership
description: Oracle has initiated significant layoffs globally, impacting thousands of employees across US, India, and other regions.  These workforce reductions, attributed to management changes, AI adoption, and strategic shifts, resulted in a 13% drop in its workforce.  The company incurred substantial restructuring costs, with severance packages reportedly less generous than industry peers.  This move comes amidst broader concerns about AI's impact on tech jobs.
